mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month change in INDPRO has Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by positive returns in no more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp upward crossing in the federal funds rate tightens discount rates and reduces equity risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.25 percentage points in 1 month or crosses above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening observations deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if mean triggered returns are not below untriggered returns with t-test p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A material rise in unemployment signals weakening household income and recession risk, causing lower expected earnings and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE rise triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases, or if triggered 60-day returns are not lower than baseline returns over two consecutive 5-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales growth falls below consumer price growth, real consumption weakens and revenue expectations decline, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month RSAFS growth minus 3-month CPIAUCSL growth crosses below 0
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS value 465513.0 and CPIAUCSL value 242.348
failure_condition: Reject if the real retail-sales trigger has a nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 return, or if its directional accuracy for negative returns is below 52% across the full walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts signal improving cyclical demand, credit formation, and construction-linked activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month HOUST momentum is not associated with higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum in at least 70% of walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: Low policy rates combined with falling unemployment identify a pro-growth liquidity regime in which discount-rate support and improving labor income produce positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 1.0 and UNRATE declines over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS value 0.41 and UNRATE value 4.6
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate and falling-unemployment trigger produces mean 20-day returns below the unconditional mean, or if the interaction term has negative sign in more than half of walk-forward estimations.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized gains in payroll employment and real GDP signal broad income and output expansion, raising earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth is positive and latest GDPC1 quarterly growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest PAYEMS value 145128.0 and GDPC1 value 16712.5
failure_condition: Reject if synchronized PAYEMS and GDPC1 growth triggers fail to outperform unconditional 60-day S&P 500 returns by at least 25 basis points on average in the walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: An inflation acceleration while policy rates remain low signals future tightening risk and pressure on real margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after the macro signal is observed.
candidate_trigger: 1-month annualized CPIAUCSL inflation crosses above 4.0 while FEDFUNDS is below 1.0
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL value 242.348 and FEDFUNDS value 0.41
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 58% of cases, or if triggered returns are not below nontriggered returns with Mann-Whitney p <= 0.10.
